hero.subtitle: Loopy guides you through a clear flow: observe sample code, edit one line, run output, check with test cases, then debug small errors like real programming.
hero.title: Learn code step by step, not thrown into an IDE alone.

cta.desc: Open the Journey Map to choose the active lesson, get guidance, and save progress after completion.

separate.desc: Output can look fine, but a lesson needs rules or test cases to confirm the learning goal is met.
separate.title: Running code does not always mean it meets the requirement.

feat3.desc: To save progress, complete the lesson inside Learn and pass Check.
feat3.title: Return to Learn when ready

feat2.desc: Playground does not grade correctness. It only helps you understand how code runs.
feat2.title: Separate from grading

feat1.desc: Write a few lines of code and inspect the output without opening a lesson.
feat1.title: Try quickly

playground.sandbox_note: This sandbox is saved locally in this browser and does not count as lesson completion.
playground.subtitle: Playground is a sandbox for testing ideas, input, and output. To complete a lesson, return to Learn and click Check.

lessonEditor.title: Edit Lesson
lessonEditor.subtitle: Design See-Change-Build experience
lessonEditor.adviceText: Avoid long explanations. Let users learn by seeing and trying. The Change step task should be extremely simple to create a quick sense of success.
lessonEditor.previewNote: -- This is a preview of the user-facing interface --

sampleLesson.title: Loopy Experience
sampleLesson.successMessage: You just completed your first coding lesson. Sign up now to save this achievement and continue your journey to becoming a developer!

onboarding.title: Build a learning path that fits you.
onboarding.subtitle: Answer a few short questions so Loopy can suggest the easiest starting point to follow.

javascript.title: I want to build Websites
javascript.desc: Learn how to create interactive interfaces

quick.title: I just want to try it out
quick.desc: Jump right into the first lesson in 30 seconds

why.desc: A clear starting point helps you keep learning and avoid quitting at the first error.
why.title: Why onboarding matters

sidebar.desc: Loopy does not force you to choose from dozens of topics on day one.

preview.desc: Start with a small lesson, clear guidance, and real code checks.
preview.title: Your suggested path

exp.desc: Your current experience helps Loopy choose a first lesson that is not too hard or too slow.
exp.title: Have you coded before?

goal.hint: You can change this later, so do not worry about picking perfectly.
goal.desc: Choose the nearest goal. Loopy uses it to suggest your starting path.
goal.title: Why do you want to learn coding?

footer.description: A modern coding learning platform with AI support and competitive mode. Learn to code through practice and competition.

landing.modernPlatform: Modern programming learning platform with the best hands-on experience
landing.learnPopularLanguages: Learn popular programming languages with detailed roadmap
landing.howItWorksDescription: Just a few simple steps to start your programming journey
landing.communityGrowing: Student community growing strong every day
landing.joinThousands: Join thousands of students learning programming every day

pvp.title: Code in real-time challenges with other learners.
pvp.subtitle: Join a 1v1 room, solve a small question, and compare how you handled it. PvP helps you practice reactions; it does not replace the main learning path.
pvp.duelDesc: Intense coding duel with a single opponent
pvp.battleRoyaleDesc: Coming soon - Compete with multiple players
pvp.joinRoomDesc: Join using a private room code
pvp.completeOnboardingFirst: Please complete your first lesson to join challenges!
pvp.realtimeDesc: Compete live with instant feedback and scores
pvp.skillBasedDesc: Fair matchmaking based on your skill level
pvp.rankedDesc: Climb the leaderboard and prove your skills

match.reconHint: If not reconnected in time, player will forfeit

notfound.desc: The room code may be wrong or the match may have ended. Check the code or create a new match.
notfound.title: Match not found

unlock.desc: Complete lessons first, then use PvP to improve speed and confidence.

feat3.desc: PvP works best for reviewing skills you have already practiced in the Journey Map.
feat3.title: Practice after learning

feat2.desc: Track match state, time, and submissions inside the same room.
feat2.title: Realtime feedback

feat1.desc: Focus on one specific skill instead of a problem that is too large.
feat1.title: Small questions

br.desc: The multi-player mode is being prepared. Start with 1v1 first.
br.title: Battle Royale

1v1.desc: Match with one learner in a short round focused on a single question.

locked.desc: PvP is easier after you are comfortable with Run, Check, and reading output inside Learn.
locked.title: Complete a few lessons before entering PvP.

bottom.desc: If this v2 direction works, we'll continue building `/v2/library` and `/v2/learn` before changing the real UI.
bottom.title: Start with one small lesson.

faq3.a: After landing, we'll build v2 library/journey map before polishing Learn.

faq2.a: No. We only use the structure as reference. Copy, assets and messaging are rewritten for Loopy.

faq1.a: No. This is a separate sandbox to test visuals before changing the real route.
faq1.q: Will this replace the current landing?

pmock.desc: Loopy doesn't make you read all theory first. You observe, edit small code, run it, then check with clear tests.
pmock.title: Change one line, see output instantly

journey.desc: V2 prioritizes clear journey over catalog: done, active, locked are separated so beginners don't have to guess the next step.
journey.title: Know where you are, which lesson opens next.

step3.desc: Hit small intentional errors, read the terminal and debug step by step like real programming.
step3.title: Debug

step2.desc: Edit a small part in the editor. Loopy checks your work with clear rules and test cases.
step2.title: Change

step1.desc: Read a short example, run sample code and understand output before writing your own.
step1.title: Observe

notice.desc: Loopy does not celebrate before the backend confirms the lesson is complete.
notice.title: Progress only increases after a successful save.

today.desc: Today’s goal: complete one lesson with a successful Check.
today.title: One small lesson is enough.

next.desc: Continue the active lesson instead of picking a random new topic.
next.headline: Return to the step that is already open.
next.title: Recommended next lesson

journey.title: You are building a coding habit one step at a time.

profile.subtitle: Review your progress, streak, points, and the next lesson in your Loopy journey.
profile.title: Your learning profile.

cta.desc: Do not try to learn many topics at once. Choose the active lesson and complete its flow.
cta.title: Move forward with one small lesson.

feat3.desc: This lesson opens after you finish earlier steps.
feat3.title: Locked

feat2.desc: The lesson you should learn next right now.
feat2.title: Active

feat1.desc: Progress has been saved successfully by the backend.
feat1.title: Done
